div.h1: File I/O Algorithm: Block Access Patterns
div.p: Scenario: Partial write (Offset 4050, 100 bytes) vs Aligned Full Block Write (4KB) Implementation Note: RMW occurs when a write does not cover the entire hardware block/sector.

g.text: CASE A: Partial Block Write (Read-Modify-Write) - High Latency
CASE B: Full Block Write (Optimized Write-Through)

ul.li: Path: O_DIRECT or Full Page Dirty
